text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm walking around<n>the academy...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...Festivities worthy of the Mejiro<n>name. And I
must also put on a<n>genuine display of true
hospitality...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: SLAM!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh, my apologies.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes, I was just a little caught up in<n>my thoughts...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh! Heya, McQueen! Whoa, why so<n>serious?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I've been tasked with greeting an<n>international
visitor as the<n>Umamusume representative of the
Mejiro estate.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I've spent such a long time trying to<n>compose a
speech that will do justice<n>to the Mejiro name,
and yet...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, I getcha. I heard there's gonna<n>be a party
too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
M'kay, come with me! Oh, and you<n>might as well
tag along too, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! The more the merrier! Please? I<n>think you'd
be a big help!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
So actually, I got some tickets for a<n>baseball game,
but I've been<n>strugglin' to decide who to go with.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Baseball, at a time like this? No, I<n>must fulfill my
duties as a Mejiro<n>before—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I'm a prim and proper daughter<n>of the
Mejiro family too. Although<n>admittedly I don't
spend much time at<n>home.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: But I think those experiences awayfrom home are what helped merediscover what makes me me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You might learn something by<n>throwing caution to
the wind and<n>sneaking out too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Well, you're a bit of a special case,<n>wouldn't you
say? I doubt I would be<n>granted leniency if I were
to run away<n>from my duties.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You sure about that? 'Cause I'm<n>pretty sure
Grandma wants all of us<n>Mejiros to be happy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You know about that uncaught third<n>strike rule in
baseball, right? Where<n>the batter gets to run to
first base<n>when they'd usually get struck out.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Maybe you could look at it like that.<n>You know,
turn a crisis into an<n>opportunity by running away.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You might be in a real sticky situation<n>right now,
but if you put your head<n>down and run, you might
just run into<n>something new.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I suppose running away in such a<n>fashion may be
acceptable.<n>However...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It's more than acceptable—it's<n>exceptional! Come
on, run far, far<n>away and clear that head of yours!
choice_data_list:
Just escape all your worries and relax, at least for
today.

Maybe taking things at your own pace really is
important.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Besides, I know you've gotthings under control, so you canrun away!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Very well. If you insist, then I shall<n>also allow
myself to have some fun<n>today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: BRING 'EM HOME, YU-TA-KA!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Nice! Round the base! Keep going!<n>Keep going!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After enjoying a breather at the<n>baseball game,
Mejiro McQueen<n>fulfills her important duties.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! It's always super important to<n>go your own
way!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Besides, everyone knows you're<n>super serious.
Heck, that's what<n>makes you so cool.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Well... I suppose I could not fulfill my<n>duties if I
were to overwhelm myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: THAT'S THE WAY, YU-TA-KA!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah, now you're gettin' pumped!That's the McQueen I know!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen benefits from the<n>change of
pace and embodies the<n>best version of herself
when she<n>gives her speech.
